feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why is Linux development centered around fancy UIs and trying to look/feel like …
entry.content: Why is Linux development centered around fancy UIs and trying to look/feel like MacOS, while the actual underlying system is a mess of 1970s code and bugs? Nerds will argue for hours about which "userland" or desktop environment is better, but scream bloody murder if anyone dares suggest that the core OS should be worked on. "It's open source, if you care that much submit a commit yourself" they bellow. Linux if the literal definition of sprinkling glitter on shit.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /g/ Technology: https://example.com/pdfs https://example.com/pdfs/ The trailing slash comes from…
entry.content: https://example.com/pdfs https://example.com/pdfs/ The trailing slash comes from the way the web originally modeled URLs after file systems, where a URL could refer either to a directory or to a file. Today, that distinction is mostly symbolic because modern web applications route URLs however they want, but the convention still affects servers, browsers, and SEO. Historically, if /pdfs/ is a directory, the server automatically looks for an index file inside it. Without the slash, the server can
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: When Mackenzie Foy auditioned for the role of Murph in "Interstellar" she only h…

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Ok, cool,...A.I. and shit... but...
entry.content: Nohting came out of it. You got all the new cool tech that promise some future shit and yet, nohting came out of it. Its like, its there but thats it. No new tech, software or what ever game changing shit. Its all just like an overpriced calculator tellign you how to optimize your company. Thats all. Nothing new. Really? I mean, really really? Like, wow new tech, ai is about to do ... this and that... where? Where is all the cool shit now? wtf? Did the cat trick me again to give her the overpric
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I'm Korean. Some of my based American friends unfollowed me on Instagram because…
entry.content: I'm Korean. Some of my based American friends unfollowed me on Instagram because I took a value freedom stance on Artificial Intelligence. I love humanity. I love natural, but I inherently love math and logics so I started my career as computer science. In early 2020s, there's no global hate against AI. It still was a toy. I somehow participated in artificial intelligence researches. I was proud of it, so I posted it on my instagram. But I was very into art as well. I had many American friends i
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Friendly reminder that sideloading APKs is exactly how you end up with malware. …
entry.content: Friendly reminder that sideloading APKs is exactly how you end up with malware. Google tightening app installs is a massive W for Android security. The amount of people proudly admitting they use patched or modded APKs is honestly embarrassing. Imagine risking your entire device just to avoid paying $3.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: "Older games were better"
entry.content: Most of the people saying this aren't even talking about good games LOL they're talking about fucking Call of Duty. This is literally what these people consider "the golden age of gaming": >the birth of microtransactions >aggressive DLC milking >season passes >obnoxious waypoint markers Nothing has fucking changed in the AAA space since, yet retards glaze this period because they were 12 at the time. It's a shame because older games truly were better, and there are so many genuine 7th gen master
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /int/ International: Why do Japan hate animals? This pic is from the Zao Fox Village. In this village…
entry.content: Why do Japan hate animals? This pic is from the Zao Fox Village. In this village you can see wounded foxes, foxes in cages and forced to be pet. Another example of animal abusing in Japan is alligator hell. Why do they hate animals?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >at least on PS5 my game discs are still safe offli-ACK! https://youtu.be/o3he7h…
entry.content: >at least on PS5 my game discs are still safe offli-ACK! https://youtu.be/o3he7hehlrc?t=396 If you dont own a DRM free or soft DRM copy offline thats easily crackable, YOU DONT OWN SHIT. You need to be able to play it offline 100% and have control of the files on the disc or you DONT OWN SHIT. Even if playstation reverts their decision, do you think there always online locked down console is going to ever let you play the games fully offline?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Theoretically if someone was to make a P2P bitcoin exchange , would this be how …
entry.content: Theoretically if someone was to make a P2P bitcoin exchange , would this be how to do it? [ LAYER 1: THE SOURCE FORTRESS ] - Hardware: Librebooted/Coreboot ThinkPad X220 (No management engine vulnerabilities). - Network: Hijacked/compromised public Wi-Fi + multi-chained VPN routed through Tor. [ LAYER 2: THE ANONYMOUS ALIAS ] - Code Generation: 100% AI-authored software architecture. - Result: Eliminates stylometry code handwriting. No personal syntax quirks or typos to analyze. [ LAYER 3: THE D
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.content: >this fat jew has your back just give him 99.99 percent of your income and you don’t own anything. He has your back. Like he made steam reviews and like you own the games you buy but you don’t own. PC Master Race I mean Steam Master Race just like Gabe. I am not a stupid consumer. I paid only $200 for 20 steam games I’ll never play and sank 1000s of hours to show to 4chins on whatchu you doing threads. Please worship this man and Steam because stupid goyiums like us need to stick together. THE C
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /int/ International: What are gender relations like in your country?
entry.content: I notice in some countries it's very adversarial, like a war between men and women. We don't do that here, everyone just grows up alongside each other as friends so we don't have a culture of intense dating pressure (leading to anxiety, humiliation, negging, etc.) like in America/Europe, or outright violent hostility (leading to constant rape-murder) like India/Pakistan.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: 157 days untill Angry Birds 3
entry.content: Emma Myers stars as June, the rebellious daughter of Red Bird https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a9D B_aUMzME Full Angry Birds movie https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wVT mwO-RzGk&t=1689s The Angry Birds movie 2 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yyn IsYc9SkI&t=1602s What mishef will June cause? It is only 157 days away from finding out the result of this! The birds are certainly angry let's hope they get home safe. 1 billion dollars guaranteed at least I would believe
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Am I really meant to believe Hammond would wait and do the same skit on the ride…

Can they inly have people named John run the intro ride? Kojima really fucked up with the directing and world-building here.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Can you guys help me reconcile a debate I had with a friend. I was browsing YouT…
entry.content: Can you guys help me reconcile a debate I had with a friend. I was browsing YouTube for covers and came across this 10 year old cover of coldplay, and was utterly stunned how accurately the singer mimicked coldplay's vocals. I linked it to my friend, and he said its not that similar. I think he's crazy. but now I am second guessing myself. All the youtube comments are in spanish so I assume English is this second language, but even then, if you told me this was a live recording of coldplay I wou
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /g/ Technology: Companies are screwing over the consumer
entry.content: This, for example, Android and the entire cell phone industry, you can have the best latest model Snapdragon cell phone that cost you more than a thousand dollars, you have to take better care of it than you would your cat to make sure it doesn't fall.Neither to harm, and yet it simply gets damaged, I, for example, had a Samsung S22. It wasn't even the heat from the updates, but after one update a pink line appeared on the screen, and then after another update Two more lines appeared on his scre
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology
